element.description: Numbered door/window callout tags (boxed square = door type 1/2/3, hexagon = window type 1/2/3/4) are scattered around every room per the A-08 door/window schedule (see หน้า10). Legible tags include door type 2 at bedroom/kitchen openings, door type 3 at bathroom, door type 1 (sliding) at the entry/porch, and window type 1 at both bedrooms.

warnings: Grid dummy '1'' (2.55 m from grid1) is directly visible on this sheet as the full-height wall between นอน1 and นอน2 — matches grid master exactly, high confidence.

Grid dummy '3'' (1.50 m beyond grid3, sub-divided 0.60/0.90) corresponds to the ซักล้าง extension outer wall — the 0.60 sub-line's exact structural meaning (wall face vs. a separate unnamed grid) is still not fully resolved; consistent with the master file's existing 'tentative' flag on 3'. No new dummy grid is proposed here.
Individual door/window counts per room were not confidently countable at this image resolution — flagged for zoom review rather than guessed.

Room-to-grid boundary assignments for เตรียมอาหาร/ห้องน้ำ and เฉลียง are approximate free-text positions, not exact grid-line intersections, per the schema's grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation flag.
This page also contains a second view (แปลนหลังคา, roof plan) on the same sheet A-04 — see sibling file _หน้า06_roof_plan.json.

Independent re-read is consistent with the grid master's own description of what was found on this page (full-height wall at 1', extension at 3') — no disagreement with round-1 noted for the overall room layout.
